name: BABY GOT BLUSH liquid blush
description:
## ✍🏼 Description

The Baby Got Blush Liquid Blush from essence conjures up a beautiful color on your cheeks with a natural finish.

The liquid blush is easy to apply thanks to the sponge applicator and then just as easy to blend.

Do you want a particularly color-intensive result? The texture can be built up wonderfully, so you can add a second layer.

### Key Benefits

- Natural finish

- Can be built

- Easy application

### More about this product

Product Type: Liquid Blush
 Size: 10 ml
 Area of ​​Application: face
Options: Available in the shades Coral Crush, Pinkalicious, Blushin Berry, and Dusty Rose.

## 🌱 Ingredients

Coral Crush: Aqua (Water), Coconut Alkanes, Isoamyl Laurate, Silica, Talc, Propanediol, Polyglyceryl-4 Oleate, Polyglyceryl-4 Isostearate, Aloe Barbadensis Leaf Juice, Diatomaceous Earth, Disteardimonium Hectorite, Coco-Caprylate/Caprate, Magnesium Sulfate, Sodium Hyaluronate, Tocopherol, Polyglyceryl-3 Polyricinoleate, Triethoxycaprylylsilane, Ethylhexylglycerin, Phenoxyethanol, Parfum (Fragrance), Ci 15850 (Red 7), Ci 77491 (Iron Oxides), Ci 77492 (Iron Oxides), Ci 77891 (Titanium Dioxide). | Pinkalicious: Aqua (Water), Coconut Alkanes, Isoamyl Laurate, Silica, Talc, Propanediol, Polyglyceryl-4 Oleate, Polyglyceryl-4 Isostearate, Aloe Barbadensis Leaf Juice, Diatomaceous Earth, Disteardimonium Hectorite, Coco-Caprylate/Caprate, Magnesium Sulfate, Sodium Hyaluronate, Tocopherol, Polyglyceryl-3 Polyricinoleate, Triethoxycaprylylsilane, Ethylhexylglycerin, Phenoxyethanol, Parfum (Fragrance), Ci 15850 (Red 7 Lake), Ci 77491 (Iron Oxides), Ci 77891 (Titanium Dioxide). | Blushin Berry: Aqua (Water), Coconut Alkanes, Isoamyl Laurate, Silica, Talc, Propanediol, Polyglyceryl-4 Oleate, Polyglyceryl-4 Isostearate, Aloe Barbadensis Leaf Juice, Diatomaceous Earth, Disteardimonium Hectorite, Coco-Caprylate/Caprate, Magnesium Sulfate, Sodium Hyaluronate, Tocopherol, Polyglyceryl-3 Polyricinoleate, Triethoxycaprylylsilane, Ethylhexylglycerin, Phenoxyethanol, Parfum (Fragrance), Ci 15850 (Red 7 Lake), Ci 77491 (Iron Oxides), Ci 77492 (Iron Oxides), Ci 77499 (Iron Oxides), Ci 77891 (Titanium Dioxide). | Dusty Rose: Aqua (Water), Coconut Alkanes, Isoamyl Laurate, Silica, Talc, Propanediol, Polyglyceryl-4 Oleate, Polyglyceryl-4 Isostearate, Aloe Barbadensis Leaf Juice, Diatomaceous Earth, Disteardimonium Hectorite, Coco-Caprylate/Caprate, Magnesium Sulfate, Sodium Hyaluronate, Tocopherol, Polyglyceryl-3 Polyricinoleate, Triethoxycaprylylsilane, Ethylhexylglycerin, Phenoxyethanol, Parfum (Fragrance), Ci 15850 (Red 7 Lake), Ci 77491 (Iron Oxides), Ci 77492 (Iron Oxides), Ci 77499 (Iron Oxides), Ci 77891 (Titanium Dioxide).

## 🙌🏼 Application

Apply Baby Got Blush Liquid Blush directly to the cheeks using the sponge applicator and blend with your finger, a brush or a makeup sponge.

## ❗️ Cautions

For external use only. Avoid eye contact. If irritation occurs, discontinue use of the product. Keep out of reach of children.
